case_title: SONAL LOOMBA PATNEY VS. DEBRA SCHOENBERG ET AL

docket_entries.description: COMPLAINT/PETITION/FIRST PAPER STRICKEN BY COURT ORDER FOR FAILURE TO REDEEM INVALID CHECK FOR TRANSACTION W2018828F006; NO FURTHER FILINGS ON PART OF PATNEY, SONAL LOOMBA

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-15-2018 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF SONAL PATNEY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF PATNEY, SONAL LOOMBA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-28-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATNEY, SONAL LOOMBA HEARING SET FOR AUG-15-2018 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
PAYMENT OF WAIVED FEES (JUL-30-2018 COMPLAINT/PETITION/FIRST PAPER) (CONFIDENTIAL) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PATNEY, SONAL LOOMBA
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK FOR TRANSACTION W2018828F006 FOR COMPLAINT/PETITION/FIRST PAPER
